blockingIssues.description: License section (line 416) still shows 'BSD-3-Clause — See [LICENSE](LICENSE)' but package.json license is 'ISC'. The fix only updated the license badge at the top of the README (line 5) but did not update the License section text at line 416. README.md now has two conflicting license statements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add verification guidance: When verifying documentation accuracy, check for BOTH absence of incorrect text AND presence of correct text. Use grep -c 'OLD_VALUE' to ensure old text is gone, not just grep for new text.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-readme-accuracy worker verified with 'grep "License:"' which matched the badge line but missed 'BSD-3-Clause' in the License section at line 416. A proper verification would use: grep 'BSD-3-Clause' README.md (should return 0 results).
